overall.description: A cinematic exploration of a gothic-style dormitory room with stone walls, wooden bunk beds, and blue drapery. The camera pans smoothly through the space revealing bookshelves, banners, and medieval architectural details. High-quality game engine rendering with natural lighting streaming through tall arched windows suggests this is from a fantasy video game setting.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a gothic dormitory room with stone walls and wooden furnishings. The camera explores the left side of the room, revealing a tall bookshelf filled with books and a wooden bunk bed draped in blue velvet curtains. Natural light filters through a tall arched window in the background, illuminating the wooden floor and a stack of books beside the bed.

scene_state.functional_zone: dormitory common area with seating and storage furniture

events.description: panning from the left bunk area to the central living space with white dresser and armchairs
camera tilts upward to reveal the vaulted ceiling with wooden beams and stone arches

agents.ego_description: panning right across the room to reveal the central living area, then tilting up to examine the ceiling architecture

entered.detail: white wooden dresser with multiple drawers and decorative items on top
upholstered reading chair with wooden frame positioned near the window
circular blue rug with gold patterns covering the wooden floor
matching wooden bunk bed with blue curtains on the right side of the room
tall window with intricate lattice design allowing bright natural light
blue house banner with eagle crest hanging on the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right from the first bunk bed to reveal a central living area furnished with a white dresser, an armchair, and a circular blue rug on the wooden floor. A second matching bunk bed appears on the right side near a large arched window. The segment ends with the camera tilting upward to showcase the vaulted stone ceiling with wooden support beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: study area with mirror and wall decorations near exit

events.description: focusing on the right wall featuring house banners and a large oval mirror
camera moves toward and focuses on the arched exit doorway

agents.ego_description: examining the right wall with house banners and oval mirror, then moving toward the arched stone doorway

entered.detail: pair of blue wall banners with golden eagle crests and tassels
floating wooden shelves holding books and small decorative objects
large oval mirror with white frame mounted on the stone wall
small round wooden table with two chairs positioned beneath the mirror
gothic stone archway with dark wooden door at the room exit

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the right wall of the dormitory, displaying blue house banners with eagle crests, wooden wall shelves, and a large oval mirror. Below the mirror sits a small wooden table with chairs. The camera then moves toward a gothic arched doorway with a heavy wooden door, marking the exit from the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic dormitory that transitions from a cozy sleeping area to a detailed living space and finally toward the room's exit. It begins by exploring the left side of the room, gliding past a tall bookshelf and a wooden bunk bed draped in blue velvet curtains as natural light streams through a tall arched window. As the camera pans right, the scene opens into a central living area featuring a white dresser, an armchair, and a circular blue rug before tilting upward to reveal the vaulted stone ceiling and its wooden support beams. The perspective then shifts toward the right wall, passing blue house banners with eagle crests and a large oval mirror above a small wooden table. Finally, the camera moves steadily toward a gothic arched doorway with a heavy wooden door, marking the departure from the room.
